message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for Series rolling ops (6 cases)

Append 6 live-pandas oracle tests covering Series.rolling().{mean,sum,
min,max,count}() reductions:

- rolling_mean_window_3 (default min_periods)
- rolling_mean_min_periods_1 (NaN-free prefix via min_periods)
- rolling_sum_window_2
- rolling_min_window_3
- rolling_max_window_3
- rolling_count_window_3 (with nulls in input — counts non-null)

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle, parses the expected
Series, runs series.rolling(window, min_periods).{op}(), and asserts
parity via compare_series_expected. All Series rolling FixtureOperation
variants were already wired through execute_series_window_fixture_op;
this fills the live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-2u7bl]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
